title: Food Allergy and Eosinophilic Gastrointestinal Diseases-The Next 10 Years.
author_string: Turner, Paul J, Tang, Mimi L K, Wood, Robert A
journal_full: The journal of allergy and clinical immunology. In practice
abstract: The first report of food allergy desensitization was in 1908, at least a few years before the first published description of a diagnostic test for food allergy. It has taken almost 100 years for food allergy to move from passive management of avoidance to a more proactive approach including prevention and treatment. In parallel, this has been matched by recognition of eosinophil gastrointestinal diseases, which were first described in the 1980s (although eosinophilic esophagitis was itself described in 1978). As we celebrate 10 years of The Journal of Allergy and Clinical Immunology: In Practice, we take the opportunity to look into the future and speculate how our practice may develop over the next decade.
